heading: Count Results
body:
The count document included in the results document contains the
following integer fields:

| Option     | Description                                                                                                                                          |
| ---------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| lowerBound | Lower bound for this result set. This is returned by default if you omit the type option and when you explicitly request a count of type lowerBound. |
| total      | Total count for this result set. This is returned only when a count of type total is requested.                                                      |
